summary: First testing pass on Dharma Battle mobile game. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests PASSED (100%) covering all 7 endpoints (config, player CRUD, select, match/complete rewards + level-up math, shop purchase for coins/heroes/weapons with insufficient-coin + double-purchase + bad-item-type errors, leaderboard sort + no _id leak). Frontend: full end-to-end flow verified on mobile viewport 390x844 — splash → onboarding → lobby (name/coins render) → hero/weapon/map selects open → shop with 3 tabs, coin purchase (250→750), Bhima hero purchase (→250 coins), insufficient-coin toast on Karna (1200>250), leaderboard podium renders, battle screen renders with HUD (hp/wave/kills/joystick/pause), auto-fire kills enemies (kills went 2→7 in 6s), pause overlay + quit returns to lobby, AsyncStorage persistence keeps player on reload (skips onboarding), profile shows correct name. No red-screen errors, no failing APIs. Only minor React Native Web deprecation warnings surfaced (shadow*/textShadow* style props and props.pointerEvents).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' React Native 0.76+ uses unified boxShadow. Migrate shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius to boxShadow. Cosmetic on web preview but will produce native warnings.

Console warning: '"textShadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "textShadow".' Migrate textShadowColor/textShadowOffset/textShadowRadius to unified textShadow style. Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:117,121

Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Change pointerEvents="box-none"/'none' JSX prop to style={{pointerEvents:'box-none'}}. Reference: /app/frontend/app/battle.tsx:306,364

Console warning: 'Animated: `useNativeDriver` is not supported' on web preview. Expected on web; on native it will use native driver. Non-blocking, but if a native build is planned, verify RCTAnimation autolinks.

action_items: Migrate deprecated shadow*/textShadow* style props to boxShadow/textShadow across theme + screens (RN 0.76+).
Migrate JSX pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents in battle.tsx (lines 306 arena view, 364 SafeAreaView).
IAP is currently MOCKED — /api/shop/purchase credits coins immediately without payment. Wire real Stripe/RevenueCat before launch (already flagged by user).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py cleanly excludes _id via projection {"_id": 0} — good.
match/complete level-up loop is correct and handles multi-level jumps.
shop endpoint atomicity: uses find_one + update_one; safe for single-user usage but race-condition possible if same player buys concurrently. Acceptable for mock IAP MVP.
Frontend api.ts uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL — correct, no hardcoded URL.
Store persists player id via storage util (AsyncStorage on native, localStorage on web) — verified boot() reloads player from backend on refresh. Works.
All interactive components have testID coverage — makes automated testing reliable.
seed_data_creation: Created ~10 TEST_-prefixed players in Mongo (test_database.players) via backend pytest and one TEST_Playwright player via UI test. These populate the leaderboard for verification. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 API endpoints working. Full frontend user journey works end-to-end on mobile viewport including battle simulation (auto-fire kills bots, HUD updates in real-time). Only outstanding items are React Native deprecation warnings (shadow*, textShadow*, pointerEvents JSX prop) — non-blocking. IAP shop is intentionally mocked. Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_dharma_battle.py is reusable for regression.
